title: Anatomy of a Blockchain Account
description: A visual breakdown of the key components and properties that make up an account on a blockchain like Ethereum.
relationships: The Account Address is the unique identifier for the account. The Nonce tracks the number of transactions sent from the account to prevent replay attacks. The Balance shows the amount of native cryptocurrency (e.g., ETH) held. If the account is a Contract Account, it will contain executable Contract Code and a Storage Root hash pointing to its internal state.
